series.curator_notes: Classic Otfried Preußler series with 4 main stories: the original trilogy (1962, 1969, 2012) plus 'Die Mondrakete' (2018). Multiple versions exist across artists - the 1962/1969 originals are the classic radio play versions, while the 2012 Silberfisch versions are modern remakes. The 'Mondrakete' episode is a newer addition not from the original book trilogy. Excluded movie tie-in and soundtrack content. All duplicates marked - kept the most iconic/original versions.

review.notes: Auto-approved: no gaps or duplicates found.
